summary: Postinstall script combines child_process and HTTP request primitives
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that imports child_process and performs HTTP GET requests, including a hostname reference at line 55. The combination of lifecycle-time execution, process spawning, and outbound network requests is a high-risk shape that warrants human review before allowing the package to run on installer machines. Without verified semantics for the URLs, the dispatched commands, and the data sent, intent cannot be confirmed.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
